channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Amazon brade ce laptop HP gaming avec Core i7, RTX 4070 et écran 16″ 144 Hz à -33 % pour geeker tout l’été
item.description: Le HP Victus 16-r1000sf est un PC portable pensé pour les jeux vidéo, avec une configuration solide compte tenu de son prix soldé à 1 139 euros au lieu de 1 699 euros.

item.title: 8 of the best back-to-school laptop deals for students — my top picks from Apple, Dell, HP, Lenovo, and more
item.description: Heading to school or college later this year? Some strong laptop deals are already live at retailers right now, so I've picked the best 8 offers I'd buy.

item.title: XPeng’s New ‘Budget’ EV Looks Like the Ferrari Luce
item.description: The electric L03 is looking to punch above its weight in style and tech as it launches in 60 countries worldwide.

item.title: Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe
item.description: Google must give rival AI assistants and search engines greater access to key parts of Android and Google Search after the European Union ordered the company to comply with the bloc's digital antitrust rules. The two decisions, handed down Thursday, could weaken Google's control over two of the tech industry's most important platforms and have […]

item.title: 11 Best Sleeping Bags (2026): Ultralight, Warm Weather, for Kids
item.description: Whether you’re climbing peaks or taking the family to the local park, we’ve found the best sleeping bags for every temperature, budget, and camping expedition.

item.title: Panne Spotify : « une erreur est survenue » avant d’être vite corrigée
item.description: Une panne Spotify a brièvement empêché les utilisateurs d'accéder au service de streaming musical. La situation est vite revenue à la normale.

item.title: Trump hits back at New York's data center ban, says rule should change 'immediately'
item.description: NY State just banned new hyperscale data centers for a year, but Trump warns this "terrible decision" could have economic impacts.

item.title: Xpeng L03 : tout comme Tesla, Elon Musk en moins
item.description: Le nouveau SUV de Xpeng, le L03 promet du confort, de la puissance et un max de technologie à un prix contenu.

item.title: Moins de 35 000 € : le SUV Xpeng L03 débarque en France pour tenter de dynamiter le Tesla Model Y
item.description: Xpeng dévoile les prix français et la fiche technique européenne de sa L03, un SUV coupé électrique qui démarre à 34 990 euros. Assez pour bousculer la Tesla Model Y ? Sur le papier oui, mais l'absence de bonus écologique change la donne.

item.title: Hyundai reportedly looking to take total control of robotics giant Boston Dynamics
item.description: Hyundai could soon own Boston Dynamics in full.

item.title: Ann Droid is the new Diane Morgan comedy series on BBC iPlayer this week that you can't miss — but don't overlook these 3 underrated gems on the streamer either
item.description: Diane Morgan is back with brand-new comedy Ann Droid on BBC iPlayer this week. But while you're there, why not check out these 3 hidden gems you've definitely missed?

item.title: OnePlus quitte la France : ce que ça change (et ne change pas) pour votre smartphone
item.description: C'est désormais officiel. Oppo, la maison mère de OnePlus, a confirmé le retrait de la marque des marchés européen et nord-américain. Après des mois de rumeurs et de démentis, l'annonce met fin au suspense, mais soulève surtout de nombreuses questions pour les possesseurs d'un appareil de la marque. On fait le point.

item.title: The Best Backpacking Water Filters of 2026
item.description: We’ve tested filters from Sawyer, Katadyn, LifeStraw, MSR and more to find the best option for every adventure.

item.title: The end of burner phones? A new FCC proposal could kill anonymous prepaid phones — and it's been branded 'misguided and counterproductive'
item.description: The FCC might soon ban anonymous phone lines in the US, which could help prevent fraud and scams but might also harm lots of innocent people.

item.title: Ultrahuman’s former hardware VP raises $5.5M for devices that control AI agents, not just record you
item.description: Aina is going to pilot a new device in the coming weeks.

item.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker director isn't worried about the impact of what a delayed next-gen could mean for Rebel Wolves, says 'If we work on the consoles we have right now, it's easier'
item.description: The Blood of Dawnwalker director Konrad Tomaszkiewicz isn't worried about the impact of what a delayed next-gen could mean for Rebel Wolves.

item.title: Linus Torvalds says Linux is not "anti-AI", tells haters to 'fork it' and 'just walk away'
item.description: Torvalds says Linux is a tech project, not a "social warrior" project, and anti-AI developers can just "fork it."

item.title: Shadow AI often emerges when workplace technology fails employees
item.description: Employees use shadow AI for a reason. Organizations should pay attention..

item.title: OpenAI dévoile GPT‑Red, la redoutable IA qui pirate ChatGPT, mais c’est pour son bien
item.description: OpenAI a dévoilé GPT‑Red, un modèle d'intelligence artificielle entièrement dédié à la traque des failles de sécurité au sein de ses propres systèmes. L'outil est chargé de simuler des cyberattaques réelles contre les IA qui font tourner ChatGPT afin de repérer leurs vulnérabilités, notamment en matière d'injection de requêtes. Un outil offensif que la start-up de Sam Altman garde soigneusement sous clé, loin du grand public....

item.title: Gay Men Flocked to Goose for Friendship. Some Still Feel Excluded
item.description: Despite positioning itself as an anti-hookup app, users tell WIRED that Goose has fake profiles, harsh acceptance standards, and problems with inclusivity.

item.title: Hisense XR10 Smart Projector Review: RGB-Powered Wonder
item.description: Projectors are adopting RGB backlighting, the hottest tech from the world of TVs. This large but vivid projector is a great option for summer movie nights.

item.title: COMPUTER COPS: Inside the big business of selling AI to the police
item.description: I stood before a hulking glass and brick structure in the heart of Fort Worth, Texas. Thousands gathered inside to see what had been billed as "the future of policing in the digital age." As press, I was prohibited from entering, but from a number of nearby locations, I met with attendees who told me […]

item.title: Meta now alerts parents if their teen discussed suicide or self-harm with its AI chatbot
item.description: The updates come as Meta and other tech companies are facing scrutiny from regulators and parents around how AI chatbots respond to users in crisis, particularly teenagers.

item.title: Meta will alert parents is their teens discuss self harm
item.description: Meta has rolled out a new safeguard for teens' AI interactions.

item.title: RAM crisis prompts further RTX 3060 GPU resurrections as Palit launches new 12GB model — I just hope pricing makes more sense than it has done so far
item.description: The RAM crisis is forcing graphics card-makers to turn back the clock.

item.title: Ces 3 smartphones Xiaomi commencent à recevoir Android 17
item.description: C'est parti pour le déploiement d'Android 17 chez Xiaomi. Les smartphones haut de gamme de la marque commencent à recevoir la mise à jour majeure basée sur l'interface HyperOS 3.

item.title: The agentic commerce gold rush risks repeating ecommerce's biggest mistakes
item.description: AI shopping agents promise growth, but merchants may be underestimating the risks.

item.title: Meta aurait utilisé l’IA pour cibler des salariés vulnérables avant des licenciements
item.description: 26 salariés de Meta ont déposé une plainte à l’encontre de leur employeur. Ils l’accusent d’avoir utilisé l’intelligence artificielle pour cibler les personnes en situation de handicap ou ayant pris un congé avant de procéder à une vague de licenciements.

item.title: I'm rediscovering Assassin's Creed Black Flag in Resynced — here's what I love, and what I'd change
item.description: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced is a superb remake, but it’s not perfect. Here are the things we love, and one that we’d change.

item.title: The unexpected hero of the World Cup? Times Square
item.description: Games are happening in New Jersey, but for many fans, the real center of soccer gravity is in New York. On a recent Sunday afternoon, the usual motley crew convened beneath the glowing billboards of Times Square. Costumed King Kong, Spiderman, and Minnie Mouse performers beckoning tourists for photos; snake guys assuring curious passersby that the reptiles draped on their shoulders really are harmless; and a group buskers announcing showtime. But there was one big difference from most days: all the soccer jerseys. ...

item.title: GM’s AI tools could cut the car development timeline in half
item.description: The new tools will help GM design better, safer cars, faster. A great acceleration is coming to the auto industry thanks to artificial intelligence, and one of the giants of the carmaking world is using the technology to reinvent its product pipeline.

item.title: Cet excellent casque Bluetooth qu’on a noté 9/10 est en promo à moins de 60 € sur Amazon
item.description: Le CMF Headphone Pro s’impose comme un excellent casque au rapport qualité/prix particulièrement convaincant. Endurant, bien équilibré et agréable à utiliser au quotidien, il constitue une très bonne référence, surtout pour les petits budgets. Bonne nouvelle : son prix chute de 99 euros à 59 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: What is Pixel Glow? Google teases new Pixel 11 feature — and it looks like a useful alternative to Nothing’s Glyph interface
item.description: Google's intriguing Pixel Glow feature has finally been shown off, alongside a golden finish for an upcoming phone.

item.title: Best business laptop deals 2026 — Top picks from HP, Asus, Dell, starting at $548
item.description: I searched everywhere I could to find the biggest savings on laptops for work, whether you're in the office or WFH.
